ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the gene */,
  "locus_tag" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the gene */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Cluster identifier for related genes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the growth condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the growth condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the growth condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strains" (
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the strain */,
  "strain_name" TEXT /* Name of the strain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression_values" (
  "gene_expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the gene expression value */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the genes table */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the growth conditions table */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the strains table */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiments table */,
  "expression_value" REAL /* Gene expression value under the given condition */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the gene expression value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_values_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_values_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES strains ("strain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_values_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES growth_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_values_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the annotation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the genes table */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation for the gene */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the annotation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the annotation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the experimental protocol */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiments table */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Experimental protocol */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the protocol */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the protocol was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_protocols_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the note */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiments table */,
  "note" TEXT /* Researcher note */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the note was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_notes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
